title: OSA Performance Audit 2018-0054-3S — Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission
description: Captured text of the Massachusetts Office of the State Auditor performance audit no. 2018-0054-3S of the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission, issued 2018-07-03, covering July 1, 2015 through June 30, 2017. Addressed to Commissioner Toni Wolf, it confirms MRC's three-division structure (Vocational Rehabilitation, Community Living, SSA-funded Disability Determination Services) and reports FY2016/FY2017 state and federal appropriations by division (DDS: $45.5M / $53.1M state). Finding 1 details contract-management-database and IT access-control deficiencies (terminated employees retaining network access, missing screen locks, login-attempt limits, lapsed security-awareness training, no audit logs). Primary source corroborating Toni Wolf as MRC Commissioner and DDS-Det's SSA funding model relevant to records-request planning.

source.publisher: Commonwealth of Massachusetts — Office of the State Auditor (OSA)
source.title: 2018-0054-3S Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission (Official Audit Report)

notes: Authoritative: capture of the official OSA audit report (primary government document), issued 2018-07-03. temporal_coverage = the audit period (FY2016–FY2017, i.e. 2015-07-01 through 2017-06-30); the issue date is 2018-07-03. Relevance to leadership is corroborative (confirms Commissioner Toni Wolf and the DDS-Det SSA funding model) rather than a staff roster; the audit's substantive subject is contract-management/IT controls. No columns/row_count — narrative markdown.
